entities.name: Networking as Enjoyment vs Transactional
entities.context: Voice primitive reframing networking from extrinsic/transactional motivation to intrinsic/enjoyment motivation

entities.name: Conceptual Frame Pattern
entities.context: Pattern template: X as [Transactional/Extraction] vs X as [Intrinsic/Enjoyment]

entities.name: Intrinsic Motivation
entities.context: Motivation driven by internal enjoyment rather than external rewards; the preferred pole in V's reframe

entities.name: Extrinsic Motivation
entities.context: Motivation driven by transactional or extractive goals; the pole V reframes away from

entities.name: LinkedIn
entities.context: Source platform where the voice primitive originated

Primitive reframes away from transactional/extractive networking
